brand_voice: Playful, knowing, slightly quirky — corgi people understand, and so do we
editorial_voice: Witty but practical — we don't take ourselves too seriously, but we do take corgi care seriously
about_title: The Corgi People Behind This Site
disclosure_title: A Note on How We Keep the Lights On
ai_assistance_disclosure: Corgi Hub uses AI writing assistance at the research and drafting stage. All content is reviewed and polished by our writing desk before publication.
article_eeat_block_variants: Corgi Hub Writing Desk — Reviewed before publishing. If it's here, we think it's actually useful for corgi people.
Written for Corgi Owners: Corgi Hub covers what matters to people who actually live with Pembroke Welsh Corgis — the herding instincts, the ears, the zoomy energy.
Corgi-Specific Content: This guide is written for the Pembroke specifically — not just a generic small-dog article with a different breed name dropped in.
Hub Note: Corgi Hub keeps guides updated as things change. If something looks off, send us a note.
Published by Corgi Hub Writing Desk. We specialize in Pembroke Welsh Corgi behavior, exercise needs, herding instincts, and ear development.
disclosure_variants: Corgi Hub uses Amazon affiliate links. We earn a commission if you buy through them — it costs you the same either way.
Some product links on this site are affiliate links. We get a small cut if you purchase, at no extra cost to you.
This site earns affiliate income through product recommendations. We keep editorial decisions separate from revenue.
